items.title: Technology
items.description: I am highly interested in technology, software development, systems architecture, artificial intelligence, and emerging innovations.

items.title: Drawing Techniques
items.description: I enjoy exploring drawing techniques, composition, visual storytelling, and artistic creativity.

items.title: Reading & Learning Systems
items.description: I am interested in studying effective learning methods, memory techniques, focus strategies, and methods to prevent learning burnout.

items.title: Music Theory
items.description: I enjoy learning music theory including scales, notes, tempo, rhythm, chord progressions, picking techniques, and musical structure.
